title: 11 Effective Herbal Creams for Cancer Survivors Managing Menopause
description: Hypericum perforatum creams contain a plant-based ingredient called St. John's Wort, which has been used for centuries to alleviate menopausal symptoms. The key constituents of Hypericum perforatum creams include hyperforin and hypericin, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. These properties can help to reduce hot flashes, night sweats, and mood swings associated with menopause.  If you're considering using Hypericum perforatum creams for menopause, start by consult...
